title: Crisp Lentil Tagine
description: A flavorful and nutritious North African-inspired stew made with lentils, crunchy vegetables, and aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped crisp and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced bitter gourd and cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the red lentils, tagine spice mix, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine.
Add the water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Stir in the Mediterranean olives and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped crisp and a dollop of yogurt (optional).
